# Combo Studio Paint

> Premium painting contractor and decorative finishes studio based in Miami-Dade County, Florida. Specializing in Limewash, Venetian Plaster, and Roman Clay finishes for luxury residential clients, plus full-service commercial painting programs with a particular focus on Hospitality (hotels and restaurants).

Combo Studio Paint serves homeowners, HOA communities, hotels, restaurants, and corporate offices across Miami-Dade County, including Brickell, Doral, and the broader South Florida region. 500+ projects completed.

Contact: +1 (305) 542-6364 · combostudiopaint@gmail.com · https://combostudiopaint.com

## Residential Services

- Interior Painting: Full-room and whole-home interior repaints with premium, low-VOC paint systems.
- Limewash Finishes: Authentic, breathable limewash application — one of Miami's fastest-growing luxury decorative finish trends, prized for its matte, naturally textured, antimicrobial surface.
- Roman Clay Finishes: Multi-coat specialty clay plaster with 24–48h cure time per coat, applied by trained signature finish specialists.
- Venetian Plaster: Multi-coat burnished plaster finish for feature walls and full-room luxury applications, requiring specialty labor.
- Exterior Painting: Full exterior repaints including pressure washing and stucco/surface resanding before application, built to withstand Miami's heat and humidity.
- HOA & Condo Projects: Scalable, community-wide painting programs for HOA boards and condo associations.
- Drywall Repair: Patch, repair, and smooth drywall surfaces before paint application.

## Commercial Services

- Hospitality (Hotels & Restaurants): Premium finishes with overnight and off-hours scheduling, so dining rooms, lobbies, and guest areas reopen on time with zero disruption to service. A specialization of Combo Studio Paint.
- Corporate Offices: Interior painting for office suites and corporate buildings, scheduled around business hours.
- HOA Communities: Large-scale, phased painting programs for community associations.
- Drywall Repair: Commercial-grade drywall patch and finish work.
- Retail, Multifamily & Warehouses: Storefronts, lobbies, hallways, common areas, and industrial-grade coatings for large-format spaces.

## Service Area

Miami-Dade County, Florida — including Miami, Brickell, Doral, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Pinecrest, Aventura, Kendall, Hialeah, South Miami, North Miami, and the surrounding South Florida region.

## Contact

For quotes and project inquiries, contact Combo Studio Paint directly by phone, email, or via the contact form at https://combostudiopaint.com.
